title: WynnIris
description: An Iris fork with built-in Wynncraft shader effects. Renders glint effects, custom skyboxes, translucency, and player emotes directly in the shader pipeline.
body:
# WynnIris

> **This is NOT official Iris.** WynnIris is an independent fork published with permission from the Iris developers. Please do **not** report WynnIris bugs to the Iris team. They are not responsible for this mod.

WynnIris is a fork of [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) that adds native support for Wynncraft's visual effects. WynnIris detects Wynncraft's signals and renders effects directly in the shader pipeline, meaning they work seamlessly with any shader pack.

**NOTE:** WynnIris is a drop-in **replacement** for normal Iris. WynnIris will not work if you have normal Iris installed at the same time.

---

### [Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/auEnBXdeHV) for bug reports, help, feature requests, and development updates.

---

### Features

- **All glint effects** including Tints, Rainbow, Glitch, Shadow, Aurora, and more
- **All custom skybox effects** for Wynncraft regions (Memory Mist, Stormy, War, Red Lightning, etc.) with scene darkening, fog override, and ambient lighting that integrates with your shader pack
- **VFX translucency support** for Fruma VFX with `/toggle vfx <low/medium/high/dynamic/unlimited>`
- **Player emote support** so emotes render correctly with shaders enabled
- **Shader pack compatible** with forward packs like Complementary and BSL. Partial support for deferred packs like Photon.
- **Configurable** via sliders for glint brightness, tint brightness, scene darkening, and Mist Woods mist
- **Drop-in replacement** that uses the same config files and shader pack folder as Iris

### Important

**This is a fork, not official Iris.** It is published with the explicit permission of the Iris development team, but they are not involved in its development or maintenance.

- **Discord:** [Join here](https://discord.gg/auEnBXdeHV) for support, bug reports, and updates
- **GitHub Issue Tracker:** [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/clptvn/WynnIris/issues)
- **Source:** [GitHub](https://github.com/clptvn/WynnIris)

If you are not playing on Wynncraft, you should use [official Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) instead. WynnIris provides no benefit outside of Wynncraft.

### Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Requires [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- Fabric

### Acknowledgments

Special thanks to the [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) team for building an incredible open-source shader mod and for giving their blessing to release this fork. WynnIris wouldn't exist without their work.

---

> **Reminder:** This mod is not affiliated with or supported by the Iris Shaders team. For issues, [join the Discord](https://discord.gg/auEnBXdeHV) or open a [GitHub issue](https://github.com/clptvn/WynnIris/issues).
